creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 145936
patch to upgrade net/sie-nmsg from 0.16 to 0.17.0

The attached patch upgrades net/sie-nmsg from 0.16 to 0.17.0.

Upgrade nmsg msgmod ABI from 8 to 9 to match net/nmsg version 0.9.0.

Also these FreeBSD port changes:
   Add an http:// MASTER_SITE url

   Set INSTALL_TARGET=install-strip rather than using ${STRIP_CMD}

   Change @dirrmtry to @dirrm in pkg-plist
